meta.title: Vela — Your daily astrology reading & AI journal
meta.description: Personalised daily star readings, birth charts, and an AI journal companion. Start every morning with clarity.

hero.eyebrow: Daily astrology · AI journal · Birth chart
hero.p: Vela blends your personal birth chart, today's planetary movements, and an AI companion that listens — so every morning starts with clarity, not guesswork.
hero.privacy: Free to download · Your journal is private & encrypted

c1.label: Rest & Mind
c1.body: The noise is external. Give yourself permission to power down before the sun sets.

c2.label: Purpose
c2.body: Momentum is building quietly. Don't mistake a slow season for stagnation.

c3.label: Resources
c3.body: A sudden urge to acquire may be masking a deeper need for security.

c4.label: Clarity
c4.body: Authenticity requires a cost. Speak the truth you've been carrying.

marquee: Daily Star Reading · Moon Cycles · Birth Chart · AI Journal · Weekly Rhythm · Planetary Transits · Inner Landscape · Slow Living

starreading.p: Each day opens with a personalised reading shaped by today's planetary movements, your birth chart, and the emotional patterns you've journaled over time.

dimensions.p: Fortune, Love, Career, and Rest — each reading covers the full picture of your day, drawn from real-time planetary data.

moon.p: Your energy ebbs and flows with the lunar cycle. Vela maps your mood against the current moon phase to surface deeper patterns.

intention.p: Distilled from your full reading — one clear, actionable intention to carry into your day. Simple, grounded, deeply personal.

card.label: Today's Reading

h.line1: There is a quiet light gathering

card.sub: This is a period for reaching out. Your presence carries more warmth than usual. Don't hold back the connection you've been sitting with.

weeklyrhythm.p: See the energy of each day at a glance. Vela maps the whole week so you can plan with the cosmos, not against it.

note.em: Momentum meets stillness — trust the in-between

birthchart.p: Built from your exact birth time, date, and place — your chart is the map of your character, your strengths, and the patterns that keep returning.

natal.title: Natal Chart
natal.desc: Full 12-house breakdown with all planetary positions at birth.

transits.title: Transits
transits.desc: Live planetary movements mapped onto your natal chart right now.

synastry.title: Synastry
synastry.desc: Compare two charts to reveal connection points and dynamics.

forecast.title: Annual Forecast
forecast.desc: A full-year overview of major themes and turning points ahead.

journal.p: Your journal is not just a record — it is a conversation. Vela reads what you write alongside the cosmos and reflects back what you might not yet see.

s1.p: Begin each morning with a few honest lines. No prompts required — just you and the page, at your own pace.

s2.p: Vela's AI companion reads your words alongside today's planetary alignments and your birth chart data.

s3.p: Go deeper. Ask what a transit means for you, explore a recurring pattern, or simply be heard without judgment.

s4.p: Over time, Vela maps your emotional rhythms — surfacing themes, growth edges, and threads you keep returning to.

ui.entry: "I felt scattered this morning. Like I'm moving in many directions but going nowhere at all. Maybe I need to let something go…"
ui.bubble: This feeling of being pulled in many directions often means you're outgrowing something — not that you're failing. The restlessness is asking you which direction actually belongs to you.
ui.privacy: Your entries are private and encrypted — only you can read them

moon.p: Live updates on lunar phases and planetary positions, explained in plain language and personalised to your chart.

ai.p: An empathetic, always-available presence that holds your patterns, remembers your history, and meets you where you are today.

journal.p: Build a searchable archive of your thoughts, feelings, and astrological insights — your personal library of self-knowledge.

testimonials.p: From daily readers to dedicated seekers — what people say about Vela.

t1.quote: "I've tried journaling apps before, but Vela is the first that actually talks back — in a way that feels wise, not robotic. It has become my morning ritual."
t1.name: Sofia R.

t2.quote: "Takes a few days to really click, but once it does the readings feel surprisingly personal. I didn't expect to use it every day — now I do."
t2.name: Maya T.

t3.quote: "Vela helped me realise I wasn't burnt out — I was misaligned. That distinction changed everything. I restructured my whole week around it."
t3.name: Lena K.

big.quote: "I opened Vela on a Tuesday morning feeling completely lost. By the time I finished the reading, I had one sentence that changed the shape of my entire month.
big.em: That is the kind of clarity I had been looking for for years.
big.name: Yuki H.

pricing.p: 14-day free trial on paid plans. No commitment — cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.period: Forever free · No credit card needed

items.a: Yes. Your entries are encrypted end-to-end and never shared with third parties. We do not train our AI on your personal journal without your explicit consent. Your words are yours, always.

Every reading is generated from three sources: today's real-time planetary positions, your natal birth chart, and the emotional patterns from your journal over time. No two readings are the same — and no two people ever see the same reading.

items.q: What if I don't know my exact birth time?
items.a: No problem. Vela works without an exact birth time — we'll use a solar chart based on your date and location. Your sun, moon, and planetary signs will all be accurate. You can always update your time later for even more precision.
Yes, anytime — no questions asked. Manage your subscription directly in the App Store under Settings → Subscriptions. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

ctaband.p: Join 500K+ seekers who begin each morning with more clarity. Your first reading takes 60 seconds.
ctaband.note: Free to download · 14-day trial on paid plans · No credit card required
